tasks.name: Mentor DNA
tasks.description: Persist user learning profile locally: level, risk, weak area, goal, score, completed terms.
acceptance: Profile visible in mentor empty state
Profile sent to /api/ai-mentor as progress context

tasks.name: Coach Quick Actions
tasks.description: Add coach prompts for readiness, next lesson, common mistake, and wiki connection.
acceptance: Four coach chips appear inside mentor
Clicking chip fills input without navigation

tasks.name: Readiness Coach
tasks.description: Mentor can answer 'Am I ready to trade today?' based on score, weak area, and risk profile.

tasks.name: Crypto Wiki Connection
tasks.description: Mentor should recommend related glossary/academy pages for each question.
acceptance: Funding Rate recommends Open Interest, Long Squeeze, Short Squeeze
FVG recommends Order Block, BOS, CHoCH, Liquidity Sweep
Links are internal when pages exist

tasks.name: Journey Map
tasks.description: Connect real academy progress from my.tecpey.ir after auth integration.
acceptance: Blocks trading advice and keeps education-first tone

tasks.name: Chart Vision
tasks.description: Allow user to upload chart screenshots for educational pattern review.
acceptance: Adds warning: not a buy/sell signal
